actionUnits.condition: Auto-timeout path: MonoBehaviour component fileID 1094190426 (script guid 9da68a9b408a56a4294168dd4694f0dc, class Timeout) has serialized field 'canvas' -> fileID 1094190421. Start() invokes StartCoroutine(ExecuteAfterTime(60)) which, after WaitForSeconds(60), calls canvas.SetActive(false). This action waits 60 seconds to allow the coroutine to deactivate the Canvas and cover the timeout path.

Input-driven path: Timeout.Update() checks Input.GetButtonDown('Fire1'); when true it calls canvas.SetActive(false). Simulate a 'Fire1' press (mapped to VR controller/button per project input settings) to cover the Update branch and verify immediate deactivation.
